user_bio:
Hi, I’m Mihajlo Raspopović. I’m a developer who enjoys building web applications from start to finish — from designing the interface to connecting it with the backend and database. I like creating software that works smoothly and solves real problems.

I focus on writing code that’s clear, organized, and easy to maintain. I enjoy learning new tools and improving my approach as I go, whether that’s trying out a new framework or finding a cleaner way to structure a project.
